class \mbox{\hyperlink{classDomainLayered3D}{Domain\+Layered3D}}

\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Layered 3D simulation domain (derived from \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain}). 

A \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain} that supports a stack of planar layers with piecewise‑homogeneous, isotropic materials. It owns an array of homogeneous Green\textquotesingle{}s functions (one per layer) used for intra‑layer interactions and a layered Green\textquotesingle{}s function used to account for reflections/transmissions across the stack (Sommerfeld integrals with tabulation). Utilities in \doxylink{classLayeredMediaUtils}{Layered\+Media\+Utils} provide Fresnel coefficients, transfer matrices, and other per‑layer helpers reused here. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainLayered3D_8h_source}{Domain\+Layered3\+D.\+h}}.
